# Contributing

Thanks for your interest in contributing!

## Setup

1. Fork the repo
2. Clone your fork
3. Run `bun install`
4. Create a branch for your change

## Running tests

Use `bun test` to run the test suite.

## Code style

We use Prettier with our custom config.
Please run `bun run format` before pushing.

## Submitting changes

Open a pull request against `main`.
A maintainer will review within 48 hours.
